title: helicteres carthagenensis
intro: Helicteres carthagenensis, also known as the Jamaica dogwood or trumpet flower, is a tropical plant native to the Caribbean and Central America, belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and analgesic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Helicteres carthagenensis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote a restful night's sleep and improve overall well-being.
